requires_image=true and text_dominant=false indicate the sample is primarily visual rather than solvable from text alone

multi_step: solving likely requires combining the wave equation with the diagram: infer motion direction/sign rule from y = 10 sin(5x - 3t) and then inspect which shown points satisfy it
the task is not a direct lookup; it involves at least a rule derivation step plus a counting step over image points
multiple-choice format with four options suggests a discrete counted result that comes from evaluating several depicted points
verifiability: answer_type is numeric and answer_text='2', so the final output format is precise
the process is checkable: derive the sign of vertical velocity from the equation and verify against the positions/slopes of the marked points in the image
